original: This ball of leftover ganrael gloop has formed a little crust all on its own. It doesn’t have much stiffening power remaining but it could hold something light in place, like hair.
{var0}+{var1}+" rubs the goo on their head to no effect.
context: <<POS:08339349>> <<VARS:var0=e.capitalA,var1=e.short>> output(e.capitalA+e.short+" rubs the goo on their head to no effect.")
